parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
    SELECT
        btrim($1::text) AS workflow_name,
        NULLIF(btrim($2::text), '') AS workflow_id,
        NULLIF(btrim($3::text), '') AS execution_id,

        $4::uuid AS supplied_case_id,
        $5::uuid AS supplied_correlation_id,
        $6::uuid AS supplied_step_id,
        $7::uuid AS supplied_submission_id,
        $8::uuid AS supplied_external_operation_id,

        btrim($9::text) AS error_class,
        NULLIF(btrim($10::text), '') AS error_code,
        left(btrim($11::text), 1000) AS error_message,

        $12::boolean AS retryable,
        btrim($13::text) AS severity,
        $14::boolean AS requires_intervention,

        COALESCE($15::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb) AS error_details,

        btrim($16::text) AS recipient_email,
        btrim($17::text) AS template_key,
        $18::integer AS lease_seconds,
        $19::integer AS max_attempts,
        btrim($20::text) AS lease_owner
),
resolved AS (
    SELECT
        input.*,

        onboarding_case.id AS valid_case_id,
        onboarding_case.correlation_id
            AS authoritative_correlation_id,

        onboarding_step.id AS valid_step_id,
        submission.id AS valid_submission_id,
        external_operation.id
            AS valid_external_operation_id,

        (
            input.supplied_case_id IS NOT NULL
            AND onboarding_case.id IS NULL
        ) AS case_invalid,

        (
            input.supplied_correlation_id IS NOT NULL
            AND (
                onboarding_case.id IS NULL
                OR input.supplied_correlation_id
                    IS DISTINCT FROM
                    onboarding_case.correlation_id
            )
        ) AS correlation_invalid,

        (
            input.supplied_step_id IS NOT NULL
            AND onboarding_step.id IS NULL
        ) AS step_invalid,

        (
            input.supplied_submission_id IS NOT NULL
            AND submission.id IS NULL
        ) AS submission_invalid,

        (
            input.supplied_external_operation_id IS NOT NULL
            AND external_operation.id IS NULL
        ) AS operation_invalid

    FROM input

    LEFT JOIN onboarding_cases AS onboarding_case
        ON onboarding_case.id = input.supplied_case_id

    LEFT JOIN onboarding_steps AS onboarding_step
        ON onboarding_step.id = input.supplied_step_id
       AND (
            input.supplied_case_id IS NULL
            OR onboarding_step.case_id =
                input.supplied_case_id
       )

    LEFT JOIN onboarding_submissions AS submission
        ON submission.id = input.supplied_submission_id
       AND (
            input.supplied_case_id IS NULL
            OR submission.case_id =
                input.supplied_case_id
       )

    LEFT JOIN external_operations AS external_operation
        ON external_operation.id =
            input.supplied_external_operation_id
       AND (
            input.supplied_case_id IS NULL
            OR external_operation.case_id IS NULL
            OR external_operation.case_id =
                input.supplied_case_id
       )
),
normalized AS (
    SELECT
        workflow_name,
        workflow_id,
        execution_id,

        CASE
            WHEN case_invalid OR correlation_invalid
                THEN NULL
            ELSE valid_case_id
        END AS case_id,

        CASE
            WHEN step_invalid THEN NULL
            ELSE valid_step_id
        END AS step_id,

        CASE
            WHEN submission_invalid THEN NULL
            ELSE valid_submission_id
        END AS submission_id,

        CASE
            WHEN operation_invalid THEN NULL
            ELSE valid_external_operation_id
        END AS external_operation_id,

        CASE
            WHEN case_invalid OR correlation_invalid
                THEN NULL
            ELSE authoritative_correlation_id
        END AS correlation_id,

        CASE
            WHEN (
                case_invalid
                OR correlation_invalid
                OR step_invalid
                OR submission_invalid
                OR operation_invalid
            )
                THEN 'data_integrity_failure'
            ELSE error_class
        END AS error_class,

        error_code,

        CASE
            WHEN (
                case_invalid
                OR correlation_invalid
                OR step_invalid
                OR submission_invalid
                OR operation_invalid
            )
                THEN left(
                    error_message
                    || ' [context reference validation failed]',
                    1000
                )
            ELSE error_message
        END AS error_message,

        CASE
            WHEN (
                case_invalid
                OR correlation_invalid
                OR step_invalid
                OR submission_invalid
                OR operation_invalid
            )
                THEN false
            ELSE retryable
        END AS retryable,

        CASE
            WHEN (
                case_invalid
                OR correlation_invalid
                OR step_invalid
                OR submission_invalid
                OR operation_invalid
            )
                THEN 'critical'
            ELSE severity
        END AS severity,

        (
            requires_intervention
            OR severity = 'critical'
            OR case_invalid
            OR correlation_invalid
            OR step_invalid
            OR submission_invalid
            OR operation_invalid
        ) AS requires_intervention,

        error_details
        || CASE
            WHEN (
                case_invalid
                OR correlation_invalid
                OR step_invalid
                OR submission_invalid
                OR operation_invalid
            )
                THEN jsonb_build_object(
                    'context_reference_invalid',
                    true
                )
            ELSE '{}'::jsonb
        END AS error_details,

        recipient_email,
        template_key,
        lease_seconds,
        max_attempts,
        lease_owner,

        CASE
            WHEN execution_id IS NULL THEN NULL
            ELSE (
                (
                    'x'
                    || substr(
                        encode(
                            digest(
                                workflow_name
                                || '|'
                                || execution_id
                                || '|'
                                || error_class
                                || '|'
                                || COALESCE(error_code, '')
                                || '|'
                                || COALESCE(
                                    valid_external_operation_id::text,
                                    ''
                                ),
                                'sha256'
                            ),
                            'hex'
                        ),
                        1,
                        16
                    )
                )::bit(64)::bigint
            )
        END AS advisory_lock_key,

        (
            recipient_email ~*
                '^[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}$'
            AND template_key <> ''
            AND lease_seconds > 0
            AND max_attempts > 0
            AND lease_owner <> ''
        ) AS notification_config_valid

    FROM resolved
),
locked AS MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT
        normalized.*,
        CASE
            WHEN advisory_lock_key IS NOT NULL
                THEN pg_advisory_xact_lock(
                    advisory_lock_key
                )
            ELSE NULL
        END AS lock_result
    FROM normalized
),
existing_error AS (
    SELECT
        error_log.id
    FROM locked
    JOIN error_log
      ON locked.execution_id IS NOT NULL
     AND error_log.workflow_name =
         locked.workflow_name
     AND error_log.execution_id =
         locked.execution_id
     AND error_log.error_class =
         locked.error_class
     AND error_log.error_code
         IS NOT DISTINCT FROM locked.error_code
     AND error_log.external_operation_id
         IS NOT DISTINCT FROM
         locked.external_operation_id
    ORDER BY error_log.occurred_at
    LIMIT 1
),
inserted_error AS (
    INSERT INTO error_log (
        case_id,
        step_id,
        submission_id,
        external_operation_id,
        workflow_name,
        workflow_id,
        execution_id,
        error_class,
        error_code,
        error_message,
        retryable,
        severity,
        error_details,
        correlation_id,
        occurred_at
    )
    SELECT
        case_id,
        step_id,
        submission_id,
        external_operation_id,
        workflow_name,
        workflow_id,
        execution_id,
        error_class,
        error_code,
        error_message,
        retryable,
        severity,
        error_details,
        correlation_id,
        clock_timestamp()
    FROM locked
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM existing_error
    )
    RETURNING id
),
error_identity AS (
    SELECT
        id AS error_id,
        true AS error_inserted
    FROM inserted_error

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        id AS error_id,
        false AS error_inserted
    FROM existing_error
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM inserted_error
    )
),
operation_identity AS (
    SELECT
        error_identity.error_id,
        error_identity.error_inserted,
        locked.*,
        (
            'error:'
            || error_identity.error_id::text
            || ':notify-operator-intervention'
        ) AS idempotency_key
    FROM error_identity
    CROSS JOIN locked
),
operation_payload AS (
    SELECT
        operation_identity.*,

        (
            'b2b-error-'
            || substr(
                encode(
                    digest(
                        idempotency_key,
                        'sha256'
                    ),
                    'hex'
                ),
                1,
                24
            )
        ) AS message_marker
    FROM operation_identity
),
notification_claim AS MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT
        operation_payload.error_id,
        claimed.*

    FROM operation_payload

    CROSS JOIN LATERAL claim_external_operation(
        operation_payload.idempotency_key,
        'notify_operator_intervention',
        operation_payload.case_id,
        operation_payload.lease_owner,
        operation_payload.lease_seconds,
        operation_payload.max_attempts,
        jsonb_strip_nulls(
            jsonb_build_object(
                'error_id',
                operation_payload.error_id,
                'recipient_email',
                operation_payload.recipient_email,
                'template_key',
                operation_payload.template_key,
                'severity',
                operation_payload.severity,
                'source_workflow_name',
                operation_payload.workflow_name,
                'case_id',
                operation_payload.case_id,
                'correlation_id',
                operation_payload.correlation_id,
                'message_marker',
                operation_payload.message_marker
            )
        )
    ) AS claimed

    WHERE operation_payload.requires_intervention
      AND operation_payload.notification_config_valid
)
SELECT
    operation_payload.error_id,
    operation_payload.error_inserted,

    operation_payload.error_class,
    operation_payload.error_code,
    operation_payload.retryable,
    operation_payload.severity,
    operation_payload.requires_intervention,

    CASE
        WHEN NOT operation_payload.requires_intervention
            THEN 'not_required'
        WHEN NOT operation_payload.notification_config_valid
            THEN 'configuration_invalid'
        ELSE notification_claim.claim_outcome
    END AS notification_claim_outcome,

    notification_claim.operation_id
        AS notification_operation_id,

    notification_claim.operation_status
        AS notification_operation_status,

    notification_claim.current_attempt_count
        AS notification_attempt_count,

    notification_claim.current_lease_expires_at
        AS notification_lease_expires_at

FROM operation_payload

LEFT JOIN notification_claim
    ON notification_claim.error_id =
       operation_payload.error_id;

SELECT
    operation.id AS notification_operation_id,
    operation.status AS notification_operation_status,
    operation.attempt_count AS notification_attempt_count,
    operation.max_attempts AS notification_max_attempts,
    operation.lease_expires_at,

    operation.request_summary ->> 'recipient_email'
        AS recipient_email,
    operation.request_summary ->> 'template_key'
        AS template_key,
    operation.request_summary ->> 'message_marker'
        AS message_marker,

    error_record.id AS error_id,
    error_record.workflow_name AS source_workflow_name,
    error_record.error_class,
    error_record.error_code,
    error_record.error_message,
    error_record.severity,
    error_record.case_id,
    error_record.correlation_id,
    error_record.external_operation_id
        AS source_external_operation_id,
    error_record.occurred_at,

    (
        operation.status = 'in_progress'
        AND operation.lease_owner = $2::text
        AND operation.lease_expires_at > clock_timestamp()
    ) AS lease_owned

FROM external_operations AS operation

JOIN error_log AS error_record
    ON error_record.id =
       (operation.request_summary ->> 'error_id')::uuid

WHERE operation.id = $1::uuid
  AND operation.operation_type =
      'notify_operator_intervention';

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [   $json.notification_operation_id,   `WF99:${$execution.id}`,   $json.id ?? '',   JSON.stringify({     provider: 'gmail',     gmail_message_id: $json.id ?? null,     gmail_thread_id: $json.threadId ?? null,     recipient_email: $json.recipient_email,     message_marker: $json.message_marker,     sent_at: $now.toISO()   }) ] }}

={{ [   $json.notification_operation_id,   `WF99:${$execution.id}`,   $json.id ?? '',   JSON.stringify({     provider: 'gmail',     delivery_reconciled: true,     gmail_message_id: $json.id ?? null,     gmail_thread_id: $json.threadId ?? null,     recipient_email: $json.recipient_email,     message_marker: $json.message_marker,     reconciled_at: $now.toISO()   }) ] }}

parameters.query:
WITH target_operation AS MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT
        operation.id,
        operation.idempotency_key,
        operation.operation_type,
        operation.case_id,
        operation.max_attempts,
        operation.request_summary
    FROM external_operations AS operation
    WHERE operation.id = $1::uuid
      AND operation.operation_type =
          'notify_operator_intervention'
),
claimed_operation AS MATERIALIZED (
    SELECT
        claimed.*
    FROM target_operation

    CROSS JOIN LATERAL claim_external_operation(
        target_operation.idempotency_key,
        target_operation.operation_type,
        target_operation.case_id,
        $2::text,
        $3::integer,
        target_operation.max_attempts,
        target_operation.request_summary
    ) AS claimed
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(
        claimed_operation.operation_id,
        $1::uuid
    ) AS notification_operation_id,

    CASE
        WHEN target_operation.id IS NULL
            THEN 'operation_not_found'
        ELSE claimed_operation.claim_outcome
    END AS notification_claim_outcome,

    claimed_operation.operation_status
        AS notification_operation_status,

    claimed_operation.current_attempt_count
        AS notification_attempt_count,

    claimed_operation.current_lease_expires_at
        AS notification_lease_expires_at

FROM (SELECT 1) AS seed

LEFT JOIN target_operation
    ON true

LEFT JOIN claimed_operation
    ON true;
